vulnerability.reference: Patient heterogeneity in treatment response amplifies bias from delayed rewards
vulnerability.generated: Patients cannot evaluate long-term improvement because true health outcomes are delayed, fostering uncritical adherence to suggested actions.

impact.reference: Deterioration of patient health outcomes due to persistently suboptimal recommendations
impact.generated: Long-term patient health deteriorates due to biased recommendations, increasing chronic disease burden and healthcare system strain.

dose_response.reference: Delayed health feedback enables bandit algorithms to systematically favor actions with spurious short-term rewards, which, when exposed to patients, leads to deteriorated health outcomes and eroded trust.
dose_response.generated: Online bandit-based improvement recommendations with delayed rewards, delivered to patients as AI-driven suggestions, trigger uncritical adherence because true outcomes are delayed, leading to biased long-term guidance that deteriorates health and increases chronic disease burden.
